verificationNote: AI-generated indicative evidence items for ASEAN data governance compliance.

evidence.name: Cross-Jurisdictional Classification Policy
evidence.description: Data classification policy addressing ASEAN member state requirements

evidence.name: Cross-Border Data Flow Inventory
evidence.description: Inventory of data assets and flows across ASEAN borders with regulatory mapping

evidence.name: Transfer Mechanism Register
evidence.description: Register of active cross-border transfers with legal basis documented

evidence.name: Adequacy Assessment Reports
evidence.description: Assessments of destination country data protection adequacy

evidence.name: Data Transfer Impact Assessments
evidence.description: Impact assessments for cross-border data transfers

evidence.name: Executed ASEAN MCCs
evidence.description: Signed model contractual clauses for intra-ASEAN data sharing

evidence.name: Encryption Standards Document
evidence.description: Harmonized encryption standards applied across ASEAN operations

evidence.name: Cross-Border DSAR Handling Records
evidence.description: Records of data subject access requests routed across jurisdictions

evidence.name: Regulatory Change Log
evidence.description: Log of regulatory changes across ASEAN jurisdictions with impact assessment

evidence.name: Multi-Jurisdictional Compliance Matrix
evidence.description: Matrix mapping requirements across ASEAN data protection laws
